visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with black hair tied back, wearing a white lace tank top and a black crossbody bag with a blue heart keychain, stands in front of a pink wall featuring the text 'THE HOME CELEBRATION IKEA x Gustaf Westman'. She gestures enthusiastically as screenshots of Instagram posts from 'roses_are_rosie' and 'woosunofficial' appear as overlays. (2) The scene cuts to an indoor event space with pink curtains. A blonde Caucasian male designer in a black shirt speaks into a microphone. The woman is seen interacting with colorful tableware, including red and blue octopus-like objects and geometric plates on a pink table. Multiple people in the background are clinking champagne glasses. (3) The woman presents a ranking of products. She holds a green coffee cup and saucer, then is seen sitting inside a massive pink replica of the same cup. She demonstrates how the saucer has extra space for snacks. (4) She introduces a circular pink lamp, posing with the designer. She shows the lamp in its spherical form and then pressed flat against a table. (5) Finally, she presents a spiral metal flower vase. She poses with her chin on her hands behind the vase. Scenes show the vase decorated with flowers on a long table filled with snacks and drinks. She waves goodbye at the end.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 你看過這個 這個. [Logo]: roses_are_rosie. [Logo]: woosunofficial. [Variety]: 紅遍各大社群的. (2) [Subtitle]: 這些全部都是. [Variety]: 瑞典設計師. [Variety]: Gustaf Westman 出自. (3) [Subtitle]: 哩賀系哇!. [Variety]: (害羞). (4) [Subtitle]: Hello Taiwan. (5) [Subtitle]: 平常想擁有他的作品 要看薪情. [Variety]: 要看薪情. (6) [Subtitle]: 但這次不用 因為他跟IKEA聯名了!!! [Slogan]: 因為他跟IKEA聯名了!!! (7) [Subtitle]: 以「慶祝」為主題 用標誌性色彩跟趣味為節日帶來全新不一樣的裝飾. (8) [Subtitle]: 現場首發釋出的上菜盤 可以放幾顆肉丸. [Variety]: 上菜盤. [Variety]: 可以放幾顆肉丸. (9) [Subtitle]: 可以放11顆肉丸. [Variety]: 😂. (10) [Subtitle]: 居然真的認真有算. (11) [Subtitle]: 我自己私心的前三名 第三名 咖啡杯. [Variety]: 我自己私心的前三名. (12) [Subtitle]: 設計理念是來自阿嬤 我也是阿嬤帶大的小孩. [Variety]: 阿嬤帶大的. (13) [Subtitle]: 茶碟設計的比較大 多出來的空間可以擺放餅乾. [Variety]: 這邊可以放餅乾. (14) [Subtitle]: 超級可愛 還可以相互交疊起來. (15) [Subtitle]: 第二名 卓燈. [Variety]: 第二名 卓燈. (16) [Subtitle]: 立起來是超可愛的球形 平放又可以貼齊桌面 在室內可以玩轉不一樣的光影氛圍. (17) [Subtitle]: 第一名 這個是花瓶 我就是那朵花. [Variety]: 第一名 花瓶. [Variety]: 我就是那朵花. (18) [Subtitle]: *台灣未販售. (19) [Subtitle]: 由單一金屬螺旋盤繞成的彈簧造型 它是真的很彈 很有生命力唷. (20) [Subtitle]: 放花超美之外 也可以拿來放派對食物 光看就覺得心情就很好. (21) [Subtitle]: 台灣10/16號限量上市. [Variety]: 預計10/16號 台灣限量上市. (22) [Subtitle]: 想擁有設計師作品 又不薪疼 又可以增加氛圍感 真的不能錯過. [Variety]: (又不薪疼). (23) [Subtitle]: 我鬧鐘已經設好了啦 Bye.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator, 1 male designer, approximately 6 party guests and staff in the background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: An Asian woman with black hair in a bun, wearing a white lace tank top and a black crossbody bag. A Caucasian male with blonde hair wearing a black long-sleeved shirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Outdoor background with a pink branded IKEA wall; indoor event space with pink curtains and display tables; a bright room with a giant coffee cup prop; a party table with floral arrangements and food.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-tempo electronic background music with a driving synth beat begins immediately. A female narrator speaks with high arousal and a cheerful tone, delivering rapid-fire Traditional Chinese speech. A sharp 'ding' SFX coincides with the appearance of social media logos. (2) A transition is marked by a subtle 'whoosh' SFX. The narrator's voice remains energetic. A male voice with a mid-range pitch briefly says 'Hello Taiwan' with high valence. Faint background chatter and the clink of glasses are audible during the party scenes. (3) The female narrator continues her countdown, her pitch rising as she introduces the products. Mechanical 'pop' sounds are used to highlight visual list transitions. The music maintains a constant energy level throughout the middle section. (4) For the final product reveal, the music intensity increases slightly. Another 'whoosh' transition leads into the conclusion. The narrator speaks the final call to action with high confidence and excitement. A rhythmic beat plays out the final seconds after the speech ends.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Introduction -> Product Rankings -> Release Info -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote the upcoming IKEA x Gustaf Westman collaboration collection by showcasing top-ranked items and creating a sense of excitement and urgency among Taiwanese consumers.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct mention of IKEA collaboration, showcasing specific products from the collection, and providing the official release date.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video utilizes a high-energy 'variety show' editing style with dense text overlays and sound effects to maintain viewer engagement throughout the product reveal.
